consistency.rarity: Consistent ('Very Rare' in main object, 'very rare' in source field).
consistency.type: Consistent ('Rod' in main object and source field).

quality.description_clarity: High. The mechanics of the planar travel, paradise creation, resource availability, restoration effects (HP regeneration, aging cessation), duration limits, and reset timer are all clearly defined.
quality.formatting: The description is narrative and detailed, suitable for an item of this power level.

mechanics.effect: Instant transport to a user-created extraplanar paradise.
paradise_features: Temporary/instanced contents (items brought in disappear upon leaving).
Restorative: Regain HP equal to 1 Hit Die per hour spent inside.
mechanics.duration_limit: 200 days / (Number of creatures present, rounded down). This scales the stay based on capacity usage, which is a balanced mechanic.
mechanics.exit_condition: Time runs out or caster uses an action to end it.
mechanics.recharge_condition: Cannot be used again for 10 days after activation.

analysis.errata_or_issues: No explicit errors found. The mechanics are comprehensive, although the duration calculation requires careful tracking.
